caption: A man wearing glasses, a white button-down shirt with suspenders, a red bow tie, and a tall, grey, synthetic wig sits in a studio setting. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional microphone. The background consists of a wall with framed photographs and clothing displays, including items labeled "LEE". To his left, a logo for "THE STUDIO PODCAST" is visible, and to his right, red text reads "GOSS TALK JOY". As the sequence progresses, the man remains in the same position, slightly shifting his facial expressions and head posture while continuing to speak. The camera angle remains static, focusing on him from the chest up, while the lighting and background elements remain consistent throughout the clip.
